metadata.title: Why Sit Here and Die?
metadata.subtitle: Breaking the trap of stagnation — spiritually, financially, and personally — from 2 Kings 7
metadata.author: Olushola Odunuga Paul

titlePage.title: WHY SIT HERE AND DIE?
titlePage.subtitle: Breaking the trap of stagnation—spiritually, financially, and personally—from 2 Kings 7
titlePage.author: OLUSHOLA O. PAUL
titlePage.copyright: Copyright © 2026 by OLUSHOLA O PAUL. All rights reserved.
titlePage.disclaimer: Scripture quotations marked KJV are from the King James Version, public domain. This book provides spiritual and practical principles. It does not replace professional medical, legal, financial, or psychological advice.

frontMatter.dedication: To the people who were told to 'manage' their misery—may you move. To my family, who refused to let fear become our address. To every 'gate-sitter' ready to stand up again.
frontMatter.epigraph: 2 Kings 7:3 (KJV) 'Why sit we here until we die?'
frontMatter.acknowledgments: I thank God for sustaining me through the seasons this message was born. To Pst, Adesina Israel, Apst Richman Ene, Pst Mark, Pst Tosin for prayer, correction, and encouragement. To my team, for editing, design, and honest feedback. To every reader: may movement replace mourning.

PART_ONE.title: THE TRAP: WHEN STAYING PUT FEELS SAFE
PART_ONE.description: Identifying the gates where we sit and the famines we face

PART_TWO.title: THE MOVE: COURAGE, STRATEGY, AND WISE RISK
PART_TWO.description: Taking the first steps and trusting God's intervention

PART_THREE.title: ABUNDANCE: WHAT YOU DO AFTER YOU FIND THE CAMP
PART_THREE.description: Managing provision and sharing the good news

PART_FOUR.title: LEADERSHIP, SYSTEMS, AND SUSTAINABLE CHANGE
PART_FOUR.description: Building models, raising leaders, and creating lasting impact

chapters.title: The Gate Mentality
chapters.hook: The most dangerous place is not the battlefield—it's the place you learned to survive without hope.
chapters.keyTakeaway: The gate is a waiting room that becomes a prison. Movement proves that you are receiving, not just reading.

chapters.title: Name the Famine
chapters.hook: You can't break what you refuse to describe.
chapters.keyTakeaway: Scarcity is real—but denial is optional.

chapters.title: Rejected, Not Finished
chapters.hook: Rejection is not your final destination—it's your launching pad.
chapters.keyTakeaway: Don't let pain name you. Let it train you.

chapters.title: The Conversation That Changed Everything
chapters.hook: Your next level often begins with a hard conversation.
chapters.keyTakeaway: Breakthrough starts when someone speaks truth in the group.

chapters.title: Faith That Walks
chapters.hook: Faith is not a feeling. Faith is movement with a reason.
chapters.keyTakeaway: You don't need full clarity—just the next obedient step.

chapters.title: Risk Management for Believers
chapters.hook: The lepers did a cost-benefit analysis while starving.
chapters.keyTakeaway: Wisdom is not fear; wisdom is structured courage.

chapters.title: Night Moves: Winning When Nobody Claps
chapters.hook: Some victories happen quietly—before the applause.
chapters.keyTakeaway: Build in private what you want to display in public.

chapters.title: God Can Make the Enemy Hear Something
chapters.hook: When God fights, you don't need to fake strength.
chapters.keyTakeaway: Divine intervention does not cancel human action—it rewards it.

chapters.title: The First Tent: Small Wins Matter
chapters.hook: Breakthrough rarely begins with a stadium; it begins with one tent.
chapters.keyTakeaway: Don't despise the first proof that change is possible.

chapters.title: Stewardship: Don't Eat Your Future
chapters.hook: Many people escape lack then die in excess.

chapters.title: Good News Is Not Private Property
chapters.keyTakeaway: The breakthrough that stays with you blesses only one.

chapters.title: Credibility and Communication
chapters.hook: Truth must be delivered in a way people can receive.

chapters.title: The Economy Can Turn Overnight
chapters.hook: Systems shift when information and access shift.
chapters.keyTakeaway: Prepare for the turn—don't be shocked by it.

chapters.title: Unbelief Has Consequences
chapters.hook: Some people see change and still refuse it.

chapters.title: From Miracle to Model
chapters.hook: Miracles are moments; models are lifestyles.
chapters.keyTakeaway: Build routines that keep you from returning to the gate.

chapters.title: Legacy Leadership: Raising Movers
chapters.hook: Your greatest success is not what you escape—it's who you empower.
chapters.keyTakeaway: Leaders don't just move; they multiply movers.

chapters.title: The City Must Hear
chapters.hook: Good news is not good if it does not travel.
chapters.keyTakeaway: The breakthrough that flows through you can feed a city.

chapters.title: The City Must Hear: Impact Beyond Yourself
chapters.hook: Good news is not good if it does not travel.
chapters.keyTakeaway: The ultimate proof that you have truly left the gate is that others found abundance through you.
